Key Sources by Tradition
Jewish: Hebrew Bible, Talmud, Zohar, Sefer Yetzirah, The Book of Enoch (1 Enoch).
Christian: New Testament, Pseudepigrapha (e.g., Testament of Solomon), Malleus Maleficarum.
Muslim: Quran, Hadith, Kitab al-Miraj (ascension literature).
Syncretic: The Lesser Key of Solomon, Dictionnaire Infernal.
